title: ExtendedProducerResponsibilityPolicy

categoryId.description: The unique identifier for the category under which the policy applies.

categoryTreeId.description: The unique identifier for the category tree under which the policy applies.

supportedAttributes.description: The details regarding the attributes included in the policy, such as their usage guidelines and whether they can be specified at the listing variation level.

description: A type that defines the Extended Producer Responsibility policy.
